import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { DocumentTextIcon, ChartBarIcon, CalendarIcon, UserIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext'; const Dashboard = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { user, profile, isLoading, isAuthenticated } = useAuth(); useEffect(() => { // Check if user is authenticated if (!isLoading && !isAuthenticated()) { navigate('/login'); } }, [navigate, isLoading, isAuthenticated]); if (isLoading) { return (

Loading dashboard...

); } return (
{/* Header */}

Dashboard

Welcome back, {user?.first_name || 'Interpreter'}!

{/* Stats Cards */}
Upcoming Assignments
0
Hours This Month
0
Pending Documents
0
Profile Status
{profile?.profileStatus || 'Active'}
{/* Recent Activity */}

Recent Activity

No recent activity

Your recent assignments and activities will appear here.

); }; export default Dashboard;
